name: Roast Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients except catsup and brown sugar.
3. Press the mixture firmly into an ungreased loaf pan measuring 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inches.
4. Loosen the edges with a spatula and transfer the loaf to an ungreased baking pan measuring 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
5. Mix together catsup and brown sugar, then spoon over the meatloaf.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for about 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
7. Remove from oven and let stand on a plate for 10 minutes before slicing and serving on a warmed platter.
